transcript.text:
*A new look on Tzuyang!?
*Our Tzuyang is different
*This is not the Tzuyang I know..
*Aiming
*Fire
*Let's go eat now~
*It's not Tzuyang without food!
*Meat!
*With seasoned seafood
It's scary how much she can eat!
Hello, everyone!
I am here at Nonsan today
Is it Chungbuk? (Guessing the region)
It's Chungnam, (She got it wrong) Retake please ><
We are at the KangKyung Salted Seafood Alley located in Nonsan
Tzu PD: let's take a break hehe

There's a lot of people here usually around this time,
*Many festivals have closed down due to Swine Flu Virus
So the streets are pretty empty..
I'm not too sure if I will be much of a help, but I decided to come out to show them support
*Korea's founders of Salted Seafood
*Where you can find various Salted/Seasoned Seafood
*Kang Kyung Original Salted/Seasoned Seafood Town
I love seasoned pollock roe
*Tzuyang's personal favorite Pollock Roe!
Oh! I know that one!
*Seasoned Oyster
*Can't stop trying samples
*Surprised at Tzuyang's sample eating show
*Town's newest sample thief
*Sat down to start the real mukbang!
*5 servings of Seasoned/Salted Seafood

*They are all perfect for white rice
*Pork broth is almost ready too!
*Drool-worthy
*Around 2kg (4.4 lbs)
I did the plate settings for Bossam (Boiled Pork)
I like to eat it as a whole instead of being cut in slices
1 serving of Salted/Seasoned seafood is 10,000 won ($8.5 USD)
So if you order that, they will give you 1 serving of meat with it.
You can order extra sides of boiled pork for 10,000 won ($8.5 USD)
*Boiled pork is looking amazing. *Salivating, *Heavy Breathing
There are many types of Seasoned/Salted seafood here
This is the Fish Gill one,
This one is a Scallop one,
This one is baby shrimp,
This one is baby squid,
*She's reading off the papers under the plates xD

And beltfish, *Cheating
*Scanning
I should try 1 of everything now
I already tried the scallop one earlier,
It's chewy and rubbery
The seasoning is just so perfect
I'm going to eat it with rice
*White rice
*Cod cheek meat
I asked earlier and I think that's what they said
Fish gill with white rice
Wow, it's surprisingly not too salty to eat.
It's delicious, the seasoning itself is so yummy
This place is really famous for seasoned seafood. Maybe that's why is not too salty
I'll compare it with the seasoned and the non-seasoned roe
Seasoned one first!

*One more time because it's yummy
The Pollock roe is so good,
It's raw but they are so fresh!
It's really fresh *Seriousness is Intensified
Non-seasoned Pollock Roe
It's not seasoned so it's not salty
The skin is really thin, it's a delicacy
The roe is plain, without seasoning
This one is not salty at all
And you can enjoy that pure taste of the roe
That is the best part.
You can just eat it by itself. It's yummy!
Okay, maybe too salty to eat it by itself ><
What is this?
*Thank you for the Plum Juice!
*The owner knows Tzuyang's love for Plum Juice

*They gave her a water container instead of a cup
*Time to fuel up!
I think it's gonna fit the whole bottle
Lovely,
Why didn't I just drink it out of the bottle?
*She just swapped the container
Baby Octopus. Seasoned baby octopus!
On top of the Bossam
Everything tastes good because of the perfect seasoning on the sidedishes
It's such a good combination with the boiled pork meat
Even better than with rice
I've been wanting to eat this for a long time now. Omg, it's so good.
Seasoned Squid
It's not long like the regular Seasoned Squid, but it's cut up into smaller pieces
The bossam still tastes amazing even if it's not warm.
It just goes so well with the seasoned seafood sidedishes

Seasoned Oyster
I think this will be the best combination by far..
Bossam and Seasoned Oyster...
*Drool-Worthy (again)
Okay this is it.
*Begins eating
*The pork is rapidly disappearing...
w.t.f. o_o?
aight imma head out
1 bite of Cheonggukjang (Fermented Soybean Paste Soup)
It's Cheonggukjang!
I've been wanting to eat this. I'm curious
This is the beltfish and this is the Herring Roe
I'll try the Herring Roe first
The texture is very similar to Tobiko (Flying Fish Roe)
*Let me eat more so I can explain better

It's yummy (The End)
And finally the Beltfish
Everyone says this is super good
It's mixed intestines of the beltfish
Salty
*Time to rinse
The boiled pork meat looks beautiful
Tzuyang's top 3 picks: Squid, Baby Squid, and Baby Octopus
Seasoned Squid on top of the bossam
*into Tzuyang's mouth
Now for the Pollock Roe *On top of bossam
H A P P Y
Kimchi is amazing too
It's yummy
*Bossam Burger
*She did not forget about the Lettuce wrap! (Ssam)

It's 2% short..
Oh I forgot to put rice on it.
*Korean Pride
*Is she going to eat her nails too!? *Stay tuned!
It's yummy~
*Now is time for the whole bossam mukbang
*Carefully lay the seafood on the tip
*Do you guys remember!?
It's Tzuyang's most viewed video... Shocking and horrifying bossam mukbang
Dejavu?
*It's as good as she remembers
I'm going eat the non-seasoned Pollock Roe with it
Yum!
Whole bossam and Kimchi!
This kimchi is really good (seasoned perfectly)
Yeah, this is it!

The bossam was just around 2kg (4.4 pounds)
*One Last Bite
*Where did all that bossam go?
I didn't get to eat that much today. (?????)
Thank you~ "I think you at too much.."
"I didn't even get to start"
*Place where they filmed the drama "Mister Sunshine"
*The place still had all the props
*So Tzuyang went ahead and tried on the costume
This is too short!
*Can't really find the one that she liked
*So the worker picked one out and forced(?) her to try it on
*Awkward..
*Rewind...
*Here she is again with a maid costume
This is the place where they filmed the drama "Mister Sunshine"

And they are letting people rent out the costumes, so I got to be a maid for a day
*Embarrassed
Nonsan is also known for strawberries
There's a weird person over there.
Hello Miss Tzuyang,
I'm Strawberry-man.
*Boring-man. *Fast-forward
You're going to be edited out. Stop being boring.
*Costume change!
Was it like this?
3, 2, 1, FIRE!!
Pew Pew
Pew Pew Pew
*After the series of events...
*She got to meet with her fans
*Photo please~
